ticket_ancho.label: Thermal roll width
ticket_ancho.hint: Pick your printer roll width. Your choice is remembered for the next print.

feedback.loading_error: An error occurred while loading the data.

impersonation.banner_body: You are operating in {{clinic}} with your superadmin account. End support mode when finished.

form.unsaved_changes: You have unsaved changes. Are you sure you want to discard them?

tenant_required.title: Select a clinic to continue
tenant_required.description: This section belongs to a specific clinic's operational panel. As a superadmin you must pick which clinic you want to work with.
tenant_required.helper_inline: Operational data (patients, appointments, settings…) lives inside each clinic's own schema, so from the central host there is no tenant to target. Soon, impersonation from the clinic list will solve this without asking for credentials (Phase 5).

forbidden.title: Access denied
forbidden.description: You do not have permission to view this section, or the current context does not allow it.
forbidden.helper: If you believe you should have access, ask a clinic administrator to review your role. If you are in support mode, open the clinic via «Enter as support» from Platform › Tenants.

not_found.title: Page not found
not_found.description: The route you tried to open does not exist or is no longer available.
not_found.helper: Check the address or return to the main panel. If the link came from the menu, the module may not be enabled for your clinic yet.

server_error.title: Server error
server_error.description: An unexpected problem occurred while processing your request.
server_error.helper: Try again in a few moments. If the error persists, contact your clinic support or system administrator.
